tweets.author: Viktor Kopylov
tweets.text:
US overcapacity probes hit macro; Swissmem denies subsidy-led capacity and stresses open access. Risk: tariffs could squeeze Swiss exporters. Trade: trim export-heavy CHF exposure. — Viktor Kopylov, PhD, CFA
More insights: t.me/si14Kopylov

tweets.author: Al Jazeera English
tweets.text:
Swiss industry association Swissmem has applauded the US Supreme Court’s decision to strike down President Trump’s tariffs, but urged Switzerland to conclude a preliminary deal agreed last year with Washington to create legal certainty.

🔴 LIVE updates: aje.news/275dk1

tweets.author: CapitalInsight
tweets.text:
SWISSMEM 🇨🇭 | U.S. Trade Update

✅ Welcomes the U.S. Supreme Court ruling on tariffs

✅ Urges the Swiss government to finalize the 2025 U.S.–Switzerland trade deal swiftly

✅ Warns that Trump could use alternative laws to reimpose tariffs

✅ Calls for a stable & legally secure trade framework to ensure long-term certainty
